description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) granted approval to imlunestrant for the treatment of adult patients with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.

contributions.description: On 2025-09-25, the US FDA granted approval to Inluriyo (imlunestrant) for the treatment of adult patients with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.
